response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a skilled full-stack and web engineer with a strong track record in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but he is fundamentally mismatched for this role. His C++ experience is minimal — approximately six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 plus a bachelor thesis project — falling far short of the mandatory 5–10 years. C++ does not appear in his current skills list, and there is no evidence of Windows-platform C++ development. His financial-domain exposure is limited to a fintech startup (RIDE Capital) focused on retail investment tooling in Germany, with no capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking systems experience. The mandatory technical and domain requirements are both unmet.
strengths: Demonstrated SQL and database experience across multiple roles (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL listed in skills)
Strong CI/CD and DevOps background (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory, trunk-based development)
Excellent communication skills evidenced by public talks, workshops, and open-source project leadership
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months in 2014) versus the mandatory 5–10 years on Windows platform
No capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking systems experience
Primary technology stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, React) is entirely orthogonal to the role's core requirements

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
